fact_nuggets.text: Sand Veil (Japanese: Hidden in Sand) is an Ability introduced in Generation III.

Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD R B Boosts Evasion if there is a sandstorm. MD T D S Boosts the Pokemon's evasiveness during a sandstorm. B S L MD GtI Unavailable S MD The Pokemon isn't damaged by a sandstorm, and its evasiveness goes up while the sandstorm is in effect! MD RT DX The Pokemon isn't damaged by the Sandstorm weather condition, and its evasiveness goes up while a sandstorm is in effect.

Contents 1 Effect 1.1 In battle 1.2 Outside of battle 1.2.1 Generation VIII 1.2.2 Generation IX Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] During a sandstorm , the accuracy of any move used against a Pokemon with this Ability is modified by a factor of 4 / 5 (approximated as a factor of 3277/4096 since Generation V). A Pokemon with this Ability will take no damage from the sandstorm if it otherwise would. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] From Pokemon Emerald onwards, if a Pokemon with Sand Veil is in the first place in the party (even if fainted ) in an area with a sandstorm (such as Route 228 in Sinnoh ), the chance of encountering a wild Pokemon is decreased by 50%. Generation VIII [ edit | edit source ] This Ability appears to have no effect on encounter rate in Pokemon Sword and Shield . Generation IX [ edit | edit source ] This Ability appears to have no effect on encounter rate in Pokemon Scarlet and Violet .

In battle [ edit | edit source ] During a sandstorm , the accuracy of any move used against a Pokemon with this Ability is modified by a factor of 4 / 5 (approximated as a factor of 3277/4096 since Generation V). A Pokemon with this Ability will take no damage from the sandstorm if it otherwise would.
Increases evasion to 1.25 during a sandstorm. Protects against sandstorm damage.
